allow: Bash(awk '{total += $1} END {print "Total lines across all pages:", total; print "Files:", NR}')

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: msg = json.loads\(line\) if msg.get\('type'\) == 'assistant': content = msg.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', []\) for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(c['text'][:500]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: msg = json.loads\(line\) if msg.get\('type'\) in \('human', 'assistant'\): content = msg.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', []\) for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': txt = c['text'][:300] if txt.strip\(\): print\(f'[{msg[\\"type\\"]}] {txt}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
